## Purpose
This file defines a JSON schema for the configuration of the DiffDoc application, specifying the structure and validation rules for the configuration object.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users will interact with this schema when validating their configuration files for DiffDoc. If the configuration does not conform to the schema, users will receive validation errors indicating which properties are incorrect or missing.

## Business Rules
The schema enforces rules such as:
- The `aiProvider` must be either "local" or "cloud".
- Certain properties like `embedBatchSize` and `summarizeConcurrency` can be either a positive integer or a string.
- The schema disallows additional properties beyond those defined.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
Inputs include configuration values specified in the JSON file, such as `baseDir`, `repoPath`, and various AI model settings. Outputs consist of validation results indicating whether the input configuration is valid or detailing errors.

## Side Effects
None identified.

## Error And Edge Cases
Validation errors will occur if required fields are missing, if values do not conform to the specified types, or if additional properties are included that are not defined in the schema.

## Dependencies
None identified.

## Operational Notes
This schema follows the JSON Schema Draft 7 specification, which may have implications for compatibility with tools and libraries that validate JSON against schemas. Users should ensure their configuration adheres to the defined structure to avoid runtime issues.
